content.problem: The festival needed a cohesive visual language that translated from early social media promotion down to the 80-foot main stage LED monoliths.
content.approach: We developed a modular cyberpunk-inspired visual system. Using real-time engines, we created assets that could scale infinitely without losing fidelity, ensuring the branding was recognizable whether on an Instagram reel or massive stadium screens.
content.results: Over 50,000 attendees and a 40% increase in social engagement during the rollout phase.
